creator: paulbeard@gmail.com
text:
Making all in docs
gmake[2]: Entering directory `/usr/ports/devel/eggdbus/work/eggdbus-0.6/docs'
Making all in man
gmake[3]: Entering directory `/usr/ports/devel/eggdbus/work/eggdbus-0.6/docs/man'
/usr/local/bin/xsltproc -nonet http://docbook.sourceforge.net/release/xsl/current/manpages/docbook.xsl eggdbus-binding-tool.xml
I/O error : Attempt to load network entity http://docbook.sourceforge.net/release/xsl/current/manpages/docbook.xsl
warning: failed to load external entity "http://docbook.sourceforge.net/release/xsl/current/manpages/docbook.xsl"
cannot parse http://docbook.sourceforge.net/release/xsl/current/manpages/docbook.xsl

Fix: 

find all ports with gnome@FreeBSD.org as the maintainer and make deinstall?
How-To-Repeat: 	make
